runtimeRedesign.name: BeoSand Dispatch Desk
runtimeRedesign.intent: Make /login and the authenticated admin shell visibly redesigned at runtime before any domain data is inspected.
runtimeRedesign.visualThesis: A purpose-built operations desk: ink-led brand rail, paper work surface, compact control bars, dense tables, and status-first rows. Structure and contrast carry the visible change, not decoration.
priorityOrder: App shell, sidebar, topbar, mobile drawer, nav states
Shared primitives: buttons, fields, tables, modals, toasts, stats, tags, tabs, toolbars
Dense pages: dashboard, trainings, calendar, court load, court requests, clients, subscriptions, broadcasts, analytics
Management pages: groups, trainers, managers, levels, labels, notification templates, court blocks, attendance, connectors
acceptanceChecks: /login is visibly redesigned at desktop and phone widths without auth
Authenticated pages inherit a stronger shell before page-specific edits
Dense pages use toolbar plus primary workspace plus explicit state messages
Tables stay readable with horizontal scrolling instead of crushed columns
Frontend remains a thin renderer over API data and typed contracts
No thick side-stripes, gradient text, decorative grid or stripe backgrounds, glass default, bounce or elastic motion, or nested decorative cards

display.purpose: Serif page h1 only; keep admin screens out of hero territory.

title.purpose: Modal titles and important section headings.

body.purpose: Dense labels, descriptions, forms, and table body copy.

label.purpose: Field labels, legends, compact helper text.

mono.purpose: Counts, RSD, IDs, times, statuses, headers, and filters.

shadows.name: surface-low
shadows.purpose: Static paper work surfaces on the sand canvas.

shadows.name: surface-raised
shadows.purpose: Rare raised panels such as login.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus distinct from coral selection.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, row hover, tags, and compact control feedback.

motion.name: overlay-enter
motion.purpose: Modal and toast entry after removing bounce or elastic easing.

breakpoints.name: desktop-shell
breakpoints.purpose: Persistent sidebar and two-column app grid.

breakpoints.name: tablet-drawer
breakpoints.purpose: Top bar plus off-canvas navigation drawer.

breakpoints.name: phone
breakpoints.purpose: Single-column cards, scrollable calendar, full-width toasts, bottom-sheet modals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one primary action in a workspace or modal footer.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; height: 38px; padding: 0 15px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--radius-sm, 7px); background: var(--coral, #e15b43); color: #fff; font: 600 13.5px var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease-out, box-shadow 120ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) { background: #cf4f39; } .ds-btn-primary:active:not(:disabled) { background: var(--coral-ink, #b23e2b); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: var(--focus-ring, 0 0 0 3px rgba(44, 111, 176, 0.35)); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: .45; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary command for dense toolbars, table rows, and cancel actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; height: 38px; padding: 0 15px; border: 1px solid var(--border-strong, #cfc1a8); border-radius: var(--radius-sm, 7px); background: var(--paper, #fff); color: var(--ink-900, #211c15); font: 600 13.5px var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease-out, border-color 120ms ease-out, color 120ms ease-out, box-shadow 120ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover:not(:disabled) { background: var(--sand-100, #f2eadd); border-color: var(--ink-400, #b0a695); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: var(--focus-ring, 0 0 0 3px rgba(44, 111, 176, 0.35)); } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: .45; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Labelled field shell with accessible hint and error slots.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; color: var(--ink-900, #211c15); font-family: var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); } .ds-field-label { font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ink-700, #4b4339); } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 38px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border-strong, #cfc1a8); border-radius: var(--radius-sm, 7px); background: var(--paper, #fff); color: var(--ink-900, #211c15); font: 400 13.5px var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); transition: border-color 120ms ease-out, box-shadow 120ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--ink-400, #b0a695); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: var(--ink-400, #b0a695); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--focus, #2c6fb0); box-shadow: var(--focus-ring, 0 0 0 3px rgba(44, 111, 176, 0.35)); } .ds-field-hint { font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--ink-500, #8a8073); }

components.name: Data Table
components.description: Semantic dense table with sticky sand header and mono numeric alignment.
components.css: .ds-table-surface { overflow-x: auto; border: 1px solid var(--border, #e3d9c8); border-radius: var(--radius, 10px); background: var(--paper, #fff); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm, 0 1px 2px rgba(33, 28, 21, .06)); } .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font: 400 13px var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); } .ds-table caption { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0 0 0 0); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-table th { padding: 11px 14px; background: var(--sand-100, #f2eadd); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #e3d9c8); color: var(--ink-500, #8a8073); font: 600 10.5px var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace); letter-spacing: .07em; text-transform: uppercase; text-align: left; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-table td { padding: 11px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sand-200, #e7dbc7); color: var(--ink-700, #4b4339); vertical-align: middle; } .ds-table tbody tr:hover { background: var(--sand-50, #faf6ef); } .ds-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: 0; } .ds-num { text-align: right !important; font-family: var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Navigation Row
components.description: Grouped sidebar row with icon, label, optional count, and active paper fill.
components.html: Тренировки3
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; min-height: 34px; padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm, 7px); color: var(--ink-700, #4b4339); background: transparent; font: 500 13.5px var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); text-decoration: none; transition: background 120ms ease-out, color 120ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: var(--sand-200, #e7dbc7); color: var(--ink-900, #211c15); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--focus, #2c6fb0); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 17px; height: 17px; color: var(--ink-500, #8a8073); flex: none; } .ds-nav-count { margin-left: auto; padding: 1px 7px; border-radius: var(--radius-pill, 999px); background: var(--sand-200, #e7dbc7); color: var(--ink-700, #4b4339); font: 600 11px var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace); } .ds-nav-item-active { background: var(--paper, #fff); color: var(--coral-ink, #b23e2b); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--border, #e3d9c8), var(--shadow-sm, 0 1px 2px rgba(33, 28, 21, .06)); } .ds-nav-item-active .ds-nav-icon { color: var(--coral, #e15b43); } .ds-nav-item-active .ds-nav-count { background: var(--coral-soft, #fbe5df); color: var(--coral-ink, #b23e2b); }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Compact display-only metric for dashboard and report summaries.
components.css: .ds-stat { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 9px; padding: 16px 18px 17px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #e3d9c8); border-radius: var(--radius, 10px); background: var(--paper, #fff); color: var(--ink-900, #211c15); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm, 0 1px 2px rgba(33, 28, 21, .06)); } .ds-stat-label { color: var(--ink-500, #8a8073); font: 600 10.5px var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace); letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-stat-value { color: var(--ink-900, #211c15); font: 600 30px/1 var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace); letter-spacing: -.02em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-stat-hint { color: var(--ink-500, #8a8073); font: 400 12.5px var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); }

components.name: Status Tag
components.description: Text-first status badge with semantic tone.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 2px 9px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--radius-pill, 999px); font: 600 11px/1.5 var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace); letter-spacing: .02em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tag-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; } .ds-tag-ok { background: var(--teal-soft, #dbf0ed); color: var(--teal-ink, #126b62); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--teal, #1c9488) 24%, var(--border, #e3d9c8)); } .ds-tag-warn { background: var(--amber-soft, #f7ebcf); color: var(--amber-ink, #93630a); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--amber, #c98a12) 28%, var(--border, #e3d9c8)); } .ds-tag-coral { background: var(--coral-soft, #fbe5df); color: var(--coral-ink, #b23e2b); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--coral, #e15b43) 24%, var(--border, #e3d9c8)); } .ds-tag-muted { background: transparent; color: var(--ink-500, #8a8073); border-color: var(--border, #e3d9c8); }

components.name: Modal
components.description: Accessible overlay panel with title, body, and stable footer actions.
components.html:
Подтвердить оплату

Сумма и статус пришли из API.
components.css: .ds-modal { width: min(560px, 100%); max-height: calc(100vh - 56px); display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 14px); background: var(--paper, #fff); color: var(--ink-900, #211c15); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg, 0 18px 48px rgba(33, 28, 21, .18)); overflow: hidden; } .ds-modal-head { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 14px; padding: 18px 22px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #e3d9c8); } .ds-modal h2 { margin: 0; font: 600 20px/1.2 var(--font-serif, Georgia, serif); letter-spacing: -.01em; } .ds-modal-close { width: 32px; height: 32px; display: grid; place-items: center; border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius-sm, 7px); background: transparent; color: var(--ink-500, #8a8073); cursor: pointer; } .ds-modal-close:hover { background: var(--sand-200, #e7dbc7); color: var(--ink-900, #211c15); } .ds-modal-close:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: var(--focus-ring, 0 0 0 3px rgba(44, 111, 176, .35)); } .ds-modal-body { padding: 22px; overflow-y: auto; font: 400 14px/1.5 var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); } .ds-modal-foot { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 10px; padding: 16px 22px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border, #e3d9c8); background: var(--sand-50, #faf6ef); } .ds-btn-primary, .ds-btn-ghost { height: 38px; padding: 0 15px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm, 7px); font: 600 13.5px var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); } .ds-btn-primary { border: 1px solid transparent; background: var(--coral, #e15b43); color: #fff; } .ds-btn-ghost { border: 1px solid var(--border-strong, #cfc1a8); background: var(--paper, #fff); color: var(--ink-900, #211c15); }

components.name: Toast
components.description: Live-region notification with dark ink surface, full tokenized tone border, icon, and message.
components.html: Сохранено
components.css: .ds-toast { width: min(340px, 100%); display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 11px; padding: 13px 15px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--sand-50, #faf6ef) 14%, var(--ink-900, #211c15)); border-radius: var(--radius, 10px); background: var(--ink-900, #211c15); color: var(--sand-50, #faf6ef); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg, 0 18px 48px rgba(33, 28, 21, .18)); font: 400 13px/1.4 var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); } .ds-toast-icon { width: 18px; height: 18px; flex: none; margin-top: 1px; } .ds-toast-success { border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--teal, #1c9488) 55%, var(--ink-900, #211c15)); } .ds-toast-error { border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--coral, #e15b43) 55%, var(--ink-900, #211c15)); } .ds-toast-info { border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--focus, #2c6fb0) 55%, var(--ink-900, #211c15)); } .ds-toast-success .ds-toast-icon { color: var(--teal-soft, #dbf0ed); } .ds-toast-error .ds-toast-icon { color: var(--coral-soft, #fbe5df); } .ds-toast-info .ds-toast-icon { color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--focus, #2c6fb0) 45%, var(--paper, #fff)); }

components.name: Court Timeline Event
components.description: Time-block event that keeps state and time visible instead of relying on color.
components.css: .ds-court-event { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; min-width: 38px; height: 40px; padding: 0 9px; border: 1px solid var(--court-event-border, var(--border, #e3d9c8)); border-radius: var(--radius-sm, 7px); background: var(--court-event-bg, var(--sand-100, #f2eadd)); color: var(--court-event-fg, var(--ink-700, #4b4339)); box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(33, 28, 21, .08); font: 400 12px var(--font-sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui); cursor: pointer; transition: filter 120ms ease-out, transform 120ms ease-out; } .ds-court-event:hover { filter: brightness(.97); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-court-event:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--focus, #2c6fb0); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-court-glyph { display: inline-grid; place-items: center; width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm, 7px); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--court-event-fg, var(--ink-700, #4b4339)) 13%, transparent); font: 700 12px var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace); } .ds-court-text { min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-court-event-training { --court-event-border: var(--indigo, #4b6bbd); --court-event-bg: color-mix(in srgb, var(--indigo, #4b6bbd) 16%, var(--paper, #fff)); --court-event-fg: var(--indigo, #4b6bbd); }

narrative.overview:
A school manager works at a laptop between training blocks, calls, payments, and court changes. The room is bright enough for a light interface, noisy enough that the UI must scan instantly, and operational enough that every figure must feel server-owned rather than locally guessed.

The redesign direction is a calm precise warm operator workspace: refined, utilitarian, data-dense, fast to scan, and unmistakably BeoSand without becoming ornamental. The working surface comes first: tables, calendars, timelines, queues, filters, forms, status, and detail inspection. Cards support repeated figures or framed tools only; they do not become a decorative dashboard grid.

Product register: product. Design serves the admin task; it does not become the product itself.

The admin is a thin interaction layer over apps/api. Frontend components render validated contract data, collect manager intent, and show API errors verbatim. Money, capacity, availability, waitlists, court assignment, payment state, status, and pricing provenance stay out of UI logic.
keyCharacteristics: Dense but legible operational layouts with one primary workspace per screen.
Warm sand and ink foundation, white work surfaces, coral used sparingly for action and selection.
Mono figures for counts, RSD, Telegram IDs, time, filters, and compact status facts.
Server provenance is visible when it affects trust, especially stored snapshots, payment/pricing breakdowns, and API-decided statuses.
Short state-driven motion only; no ornamental page choreography.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Coral is for action, selection, and urgent emphasis only. If coral appears in decoration, remove it.

rules.name: The Server Truth Rule
rules.body: State colors label API-decided facts. They must not imply local recomputation of price, availability, capacity, payment state, or court assignment.

rules.name: The No Side-Stripe Cleanup Rule
rules.body: During the redesign, remove thick side-tab accent borders and card/list border-left accents greater than 1px. Replace them with full borders, filled status tags, compact icons, row selection backgrounds, or text labels.

rules.name: The Data First Type Rule
rules.body: Use mono for operational facts that benefit from alignment or quick comparison. Do not use decorative type inside controls, tags, data cells, or filters.

rules.name: The No Hero Admin Rule
rules.body: Admin screens start with the working surface. No oversized hero type, marketing panels, or decorative metric headers.

rules.name: The Flat Until State Rule
rules.body: At rest, interfaces are defined by borders, spacing, and tonal surfaces. Lift appears for overlays, hover feedback, and keyboard focus.

rules.name: The Motion Cleanup Rule
rules.body: Replace bounce or elastic easing with short ease-out/quart-like curves. Modal, sheet, toast, and drawer motion must be 120-220ms, state-driven, and compatible with reduced motion.

dos: Do start every admin screen with the operational workspace: table, calendar, timeline, queue, form, or report.
Do keep apps/admin thin over typed API contracts. Render server-decided money, capacity, availability, waitlists, court assignment, payment state, and status.
Do use Russian UI strings, Serbian where the product already uses it, and whole-dinar RSD display via the shared formatter.
Do make provenance visible when trust depends on it: stored booking prices, pricing breakdowns, monthly count context, server decisions, and editable manager inputs should not blur together.
Do preserve dense scanning: sticky headers, mono figures, right-aligned numeric columns, compact filters, clear status tags, and explicit empty/error/loading states.
Do keep keyboard focus visible and separate from brand accent by using the blue focus ring.
Do make mobile layouts structurally safe: drawer navigation, horizontally scrollable dense grids, full-width toasts, and bottom-sheet modals.
donts: Don't create generic SaaS dashboard kits with interchangeable blue/gray cards and decorative metrics.
Don't create loud sports or fitness interfaces that prioritize energy over operational clarity.
Don't make Telegram-bot-like admin screens that feel like a thin chat wrapper instead of a real console.
Don't use overly ornamental editorial UI that makes dense tables, forms, and exception queues harder to use.
Don't make the frontend appear to recompute prices, capacity, or availability instead of clearly reflecting server-owned state.
Don't use thick side-tab accent borders or border-left accents greater than 1px on cards, list items, notes, toasts, or calendar chips in the redesign.
Don't use bounce, elastic, or overshooting cubic-bezier motion. Motion is short, state-driven, and reduced-motion aware.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, decorative grid/stripe backgrounds, oversized cards, nested cards, or marketing hero sections.
Don't hide critical action text behind icons unless the icon is familiar and has an accessible label or tooltip.
